Title: ODC accession number
Description: ODC-SCI assigned accession number (ID)
Comments: automatically assigned by ODC-SCI at time of dataset creation

Title: DOI
Description: DOI assigned to dataset
Comments: automatically assigned by ODC-SCI when approved for publication

Title: Dataset title
Description: Published dataset title

Title: Dataset type
Description: Identifies type of data contained in dataset; datasets may include one or more types of data [types: animal: data from animal study; animal - derived: data derived from modelling animal study data; clinical - data from clinical study; clinical - hypothetical: artifical data created to mimic clinical study data; cell: cell culture data (in vitro data)]
PermittedValues: animal; animal - derived; cell; clinical; clinical - hypothetical

Title: Publication year
Description: Year dataset was published on ODC-SCI

Title: Laboratory name
Description: Name of publishing laboratory on ODC-SCI

Title: Study leader
Description: Name of person responsible for overseeing project

Title: Number of unique subjects in dataset
Description: Total number of unique subjects reported in dataset (animal and/or deidentified human)
Comments: unique subject IDs associated with cell (in vitro) data are EXCLUDED from this count

Title: Species type(s) in dataset
Description: Name of species type(s) reported in dataset [species: human (deidentified); mouse; pig; primate; rat]

Title: Strain type(s) in dataset
Description: Name of strain type(s) reported in dataset

Title: Sex type(s) in dataset
Description: Sex type(s) reported in dataset [sex types: female; male; unknown: data marked unknown by author; not reported: data not reported and/or variable missing from dataset entirely]

Title: Vendor or origin of the subjects
Description: Vendor or origin of research subjects reported in dataset

Title: Age range of subjects
Description: Age range of subjects reported in dataset
Comments: not standardized to a specific experimental time

Title: Weight range of subjects
Description: Weight range of subjects reported in dataset
Comments: not standardized to a specific experimental time

Title: Type or model of injury
Description: Type(s) or model(s) of spinal cord injury reported in the dataset [injury types: contusion; neurologically intact; transection - hemisection; transection - DLQ]
PermittedValues: contusion; neurologically intact; transection - hemisection; transection - DLQ

Title: Anatomical level of spinal cord injury
Description: Anatomical level of spinal cord injury [levels: cervical; thoracic; lumbar]

Title: Spinal cord level of the injury
Description: Spinal cord level at which the injury was performed including segment and number (e.g. C5)

Title: Injury laterality
Description: Laterality of planned SCI lesion (i.e. the side that was affected during surgical induction of SCI) [Laterality: left - left side; right - right side; central - midline]

Title: Device used for injury
Description: Name of the device(s) used for the injury [Device(s): {INSERT NAME OF DEVICE(S)}]

Title: Injury severity
Description: Injury severity as reported in dataset and/or dataset metadata [in contusion models: mild; moderate; severe; in transection models: incomplete; complete; in clinical data: AIS score; not reported]
PermittedValues: mild; moderate; severe; incomplete; complete; AIS score A-E; not reported

Title: Contusion model data available
Description: A list of programmed and actual contusion model parameters reported in dataset and/or dataset metadata [data: programmed force; force; programmed displacement; displacement; programmed dwell time; dwell time; programmed velocity; velocity]
PermittedValues: programmed force; force; programmed displacement; displacement; programmed dwell time; dwell time; programmed velocity; velocity

Title: Locomotor behaviour tests
Description: A list of locomotor behaviour tests [tests: BBB: Basso-Beattie-Bresnahan locomotor score; BMS: Basso Mouse Scale for locomotion; ladder walking]

Title: Behaviour tests (non-locomotor)
Description: A list of non-locomotor behaviour tests reported in dataset

Title: Intervention type
Description: Broad classification of intervention type(s) reported in dataset [intervention types: drug/agent; electrical stimulation; diet; environmental; fecal microbiota transplant; genetic; graft/cellular; optogenetic; rehabilitative training]
PermittedValues: drug/agent; electrical stimulation; diet; environmental; fecal microbiota transplant; genetic; graft/cellular; optogenetic; rehabilitative training

Title: Author keywords
Description: Author keywords in metadata

Title: Related datasets
Description: Related datasets on ODC-SCI (e.g., datasets that contain the same subjects and/or contain related experimental data)
